# Scenario: Question popup dismiss in subagent session
#
# Tests that answering a question popup properly dismisses it and
# does NOT re-show from a stale duplicate in --pending.
# This catches the dual-dispatch bug where the same request is
# queued in both child and root buffers' --pending lists.
#
# Flow:
#   1. Session gets an assistant message
#   2. Question tool part arrives (pending)
#   3. question.asked SSE event → popup shown
#   4. User selects option 1 and submits (RET)
#   5. Popup should be dismissed — NOT re-shown

:session ses_qdismiss
:directory /tmp/qdismiss-test

# Mock APIs
:api POST /session/ses_qdismiss/prompt_async 204 null
:api POST /question/que_dismiss_test/reply 200 true

# --- Assistant message ---

:sse {"directory":"/tmp/qdismiss-test","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst_qd","sessionID":"ses_qdismiss","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1772900000000},"agent":"build","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"anthropic","tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# --- Step start ---

:sse {"directory":"/tmp/qdismiss-test","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step_qd","sessionID":"ses_qdismiss","messageID":"msg_asst_qd","type":"step-start","snapshot":"abc123"}}}}

# --- Question tool part (pending) ---

:sse {"directory":"/tmp/qdismiss-test","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_qtool_qd","sessionID":"ses_qdismiss","messageID":"msg_asst_qd","type":"tool","callID":"call_question_qd","tool":"question","state":{"status":"pending","input":{},"raw":""}}}}}

# --- question.asked SSE event ---

:sse {"directory":"/tmp/qdismiss-test","payload":{"type":"question.asked","properties":{"id":"que_dismiss_test","sessionID":"ses_qdismiss","questions":[{"question":"Pick your favorite","header":"Favorite","options":[{"label":"Alpha","description":"First option"},{"label":"Beta","description":"Second option"},{"label":"Gamma","description":"Third option"}]}],"tool":{"messageID":"msg_asst_qd","callID":"call_question_qd"}}}}

# Question popup should be displayed
:assert-question
:assert-contains Pick your favorite
:assert-contains Alpha
:assert-contains Beta
:assert-contains Gamma

# --- User answers: select option 1 and submit ---

:answer-question 1
:assert-no-question

# Verify the popup is truly gone — input area should be restored
:eval (should (opencode-popup--input-area-valid-p))
:eval (should-not opencode-popup--inline-p)
